violations.text: Inspector observed an accumulation of leaf litter and other debris behind the outside trash receptacle. Area should be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. -floors in the walk-in cooler, -wall behind the soda syrup, -floors under retail shelves. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The men's restroom is lacking handwashing signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands is required at all hand washing sinks used by food employees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the counters under/behind coffee machines have an accumulation of dust and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
Inspector observed a leak at pvc pipes under 3 bay sink in the back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The floors in walk in freezers and under soda machine in back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
